title: Floof's totally normal minecraft
description: FTNM (Floof's totally normal minecraft) is a relatively small modpack that adds customizablility on how one plays minecraft, whether it be through automating everything, or exploring the world around you with your friends.
body:
The Floof's totally normal minecraft modpack aims to provide a custom and very different experience to minecraft. This modpack is made with some functionality between the mods and although not perfect should run smoothly on a good computer.

Use create to make new farms, obstacle courses to challange your friends on or make trains to travel the world in. And with parcool you have new ways to explore the world, with the ability to hang on walls, preform cat jumps and more! With the addition of essential and plasmo voice joining and interacting with friends has never been easier to do.
